cards.back: A process of summarizing and visualizing datasets to understand their structure, distribution, and relationships.
A type of plot used to visualize the relationship between two variables.
A statistical measure of the strength and direction of the linear relationship between two variables.

cards.front: What is the purpose of plotting histograms?
cards.back: To visualize the distribution and central tendency of a dataset.

cards.front: What is the difference between univariate and multivariate analysis?
cards.back: Univariate analysis focuses on one variable at a time, while multivariate analysis examines multiple variables simultaneously.
